texto: Sometimes a book that appeared dull or off-putting would somehow still draw you in, call to you, and when you finally embarked on the adventure inside you found yourself partaking in something wondrous and unfathomably rich.
explicacao: Citação de Liam W. Russell sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Sometimes a book that appeared dull or off-putting would somehow still draw you in, call to you, …” articula reflexao, reading, sometimes em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
